title: bytedance/deer-flow
summary: ByteDance's open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. Uses sandbox, memory, tools, skills, subagents and message gateway to handle tasks from minutes to hours. 71,058 stars, MIT license.
chinese_summary: 字节跳动开源的长时程 SuperAgent 框架，六层架构（沙箱/记忆/工具/技能/子Agent/消息网关）处理分钟到小时级任务，71,058 星，MIT 协议。
